mapper.select: SELECT * FROM diet_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date = #{recordDate} ORDER BY recorded_at

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(carb_grams), 0) AS carbGrams, COALESCE(SUM(protein_grams), 0) AS proteinGrams, COALESCE(SUM(fat_grams), 0) AS fatGrams, COALESCE(SUM(calories), 0) AS calories FROM diet_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date = #{recordDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diet_record (user_id, record_date, meal_type, food_name, image_url, carb_grams, protein_grams, fat_grams, calories) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recordDate}, #{mealType}, #{foodName}, #{imageUrl}, #{carbGrams}, #{proteinGrams}, #{fatGrams}, #{calories})
